title: LiveKit token endpoint
description: Install livekit-server-sdk, create API route for token generation.

title: Square video feed components
description: Render player video feeds as square aspect ratio. Add toggle between fit-to-square (letterboxed) and center-crop modes. Store preference in local state.

title: Fixed overlay navigation
description: Move back button, game name, player banner etc. into a fixed/absolute overlay at top or bottom of screen. Semi-transparent, does not affect game board layout or cause scroll.

title: Monopoly board UI component
description: Visual board layout, dice roll animation, buy/upgrade prompts, player tokens, coin display. Kid-friendly with big icons.

title: Winner splash animations (3 variations)
description: Create 3 distinct winner celebration animations: e.g. confetti burst, fireworks, trophy drop. Full-screen overlay on the game board. CSS/canvas animations, no external deps.

title: Invite management system
description:
Full invite lifecycle for family members. Currently we only create a pending record — need email sending, tracking, revocation, and role-based invites (parent=admin vs player).

Sub-tasks:
- Send invite email (Supabase Auth email or Resend/SendGrid integration)
- Invite dashboard: list pending/accepted/revoked invites for parents
- Revoke invite (delete from family_invites, show confirmation)
- Role-based invites: parent (admin — can manage family, invite others, start games) vs player (kid — can only play)
- Invite expiry (optional TTL on pending invites)
- Guard rails: prevent inviting yourself, prevent duplicate invites across families
- UI: show invite status in family home screen (pending invites with option to resend/revoke)

title: Monopoly game engine with tests
description: Pure game logic for Junior Monopoly. 24-space board, 4 property groups (bunny/cat/unicorn/witch), coins, dice, buy/upgrade/rent mechanics. First to 30 coins wins.

title: Position video feeds around game board
description: Layout video feeds on the four corners, four sides, or bottom strip depending on player count and screen size. Responsive: corners on landscape/tablet, bottom strip on portrait/phone.

title: Supabase client setup and auth middleware
description: Create .env.local template, Supabase browser/server clients, auth middleware, Next.js middleware.

title: Winning/losing animations epic
description: Amazing spectacular win/lose animations and sounds, shared across all games.

title: S.O.S. game logic (TDD)
description: S.O.S. game with SOS detection, scoring, extra turns, multi-player, tests.

title: Family onboarding
description: Server actions for family/player creation, onboarding page with character selection.
close_reason: Completed by parallel agent - server actions + onboarding page

title: Parent notifications
description: Notification utility, broadcast kid login events to parent devices.
close_reason: Completed - notification utility, broadcast on kid login

title: Junior Monopoly (Magic Land) game
description: Kid-friendly Monopoly for 5-6 year olds. 24-space board, animal/unicorn/witch theme, coin economy (1/2/5), 1 die, first to 30 coins wins. 10-15 min games.

title: Game room page (video + game boards)
description: Game room page, video chat component, tic-tac-toe board, SOS board, useGameRoom hook.
close_reason: Completed - game room, video chat, TTT + SOS boards, useGameRoom hook

title: Loser splash animations (3 variations)
description: Create 3 distinct loser animations: e.g. rain cloud, dramatic fade, silly wobble. Playful/funny rather than mean — this is for kids. Full-screen overlay.

title: Character SVG assets
description: Create 8 kid-friendly animal SVG avatars.

title: Database schema migration
description: SQL migration with all tables, indexes, seed characters, and RLS policies.

title: Video feed winner/loser effects
description: Add visual effects to player video feed windows at game end. Winner gets crown/glow/confetti frame. Losers get a subtle funny effect. Animations sync with splash screen.

title: Game engine + Tic-Tac-Toe (TDD)
description: GameDefinition interface, tic-tac-toe implementation with tests, game registry.

title: Mobile-first game room layout
description: Redesign the game room UI to be fully mobile/iPad friendly. Game board centered, no scrolling in any direction. Video feeds on corners/sides or bottom with square aspect ratio (fit or crop options). Navigation overlaid as fixed elements.

title: Win/lose animation splash screens
description: Fun animated splash screens at end of game. At least 3 variations each for winners and losers. Animations play over the game board and can include effects on player video feed windows (e.g. crown/confetti on winner, sad/funny effect on losers).

title: Register Monopoly in game system
description: Add to registry, BOARD_COMPONENTS map, and room page imports.

title: Lobby page and room creation
description: Lobby page, room server actions, active player hook, realtime room subscriptions.
close_reason: Completed - lobby page, room actions, active player hook

title: Google sign-in flow
description: Login page, auth callback route, root page redirect.

title: End-to-end smoke test
description: Manual test checklist: auth, onboarding, lobby, game play, video chat.

title: Reliable realtime infrastructure independent of video chat
description:
Supabase Realtime broadcast is broken: server acknowledges sends (returns 'ok') but messages never reach other clients or appear in the Realtime Inspector. Currently game sync uses LiveKit data messages as a workaround, but this ties all realtime features to the video chat connection. Need a reliable standalone realtime transport for: game state sync, lobby notifications, invite alerts, and future features like AI game host announcements.

Sub-tasks:
- Diagnose why Supabase broadcast acks but doesn't relay (check project config, contact Supabase support)
- Evaluate alternatives if Supabase can't be fixed (e.g. LiveKit data-only rooms, Ably, Pusher)
- Migrate game sync back to standalone realtime once fixed
- Add lobby/invite realtime notifications

Current workaround: LiveKit data messages for game sync, DB polling (3s) as fallback.

title: Viewport-locked game room layout
description: Restructure game room page to use 100vh/100vw with no scroll. Game board centered with flexbox/grid. All content must fit within the viewport on mobile and iPad.

title: Family home screen (player select)
description: Home page with player avatars, add member dialog, useFamily hook.
close_reason: Completed - home page, add-member dialog, useFamily hook

title: Integrate end-game animations into game room
description: Wire up the animation system to game room. Pick a random variation on game end. Show splash + video effects for a few seconds before revealing final scores and Play Again button.
